p_element: 2ONE Chewy Watermelon 8mg combines the flavors of candy-like bubblegum and juicy watermelon, creating a sweet-centric tasting experience. Moreover, each pouch contains 8mg of nicotine, cementing them in the strong category. So, those more experienced users are better suited to the robust 2ONE nicotine sensation.

2ONE Very Berry 8mg tastes no different than it sounds. It is sweet, tart, and tangy, combining different flavors to create a well-balanced berry-tasting experience. Within each of these fruity pouches is 8mg of nicotine, meaning each berry burst is accompanied by a significant nicotine sensation, suiting themselves to more experienced users.

2ONE Naked 8mg is unflavored and therefore doesn’t offer a specific flavor experience, so to speak, but it provides a sensation in its place. These nicotine pouches are refreshing, with a cooling sensation typically found within a minty flavor, but here, it stands alone. Each pouch contains 8mg of nicotine, which is more than enough for intermediate users to experience a satisfying nicotine sensation.

2ONE Glacier Mint 8mg is a nicotine pouch that brings a winter chill to your palate. With notes of herbal peppermint, it's a refreshing and cooling-tasting experience. Along with flavor comes nicotine, and in 2ONE’s case, 8mg is in each pouch, providing a significant nicotine sensation that is robust enough for those familiar with this product.

2ONE Citrus 8mg is the perfect balance of lemon and lime, with sour, tart, and bitter notes brought together by a subtle sweetness. To accompany this tasting experience, 8 mg of nicotine is in each pouch, making it a strong product.

2ONE Wintergreen 8mg is one of the most popular tasting experiences in the US. It’s minty, aromatic, and cool, entertaining and refreshing the palate at the same time. Accompanying this flavor profile is 8mg of nicotine per pouch, providing a present sensation suited for all-day use for the more experienced user. This strength may be outside your wheelhouse for those new to this product.

ALP Chilled Mint 3mg is your standard mint flavor; it’s straightforward and doesn’t mess around. With a cool and fresh herbal flavor, your palate is refreshed instantly. Due to its standard strength, users of all experiences can enjoy it. However, those more advanced users may find the nicotine content to be low. That’s why ALP has this tasting experience in two stronger strengths, both of which are available at Prilla.com.

ALP Chilled Mint 6mg is the go-to mint nicotine pouch. It’s balanced and, most importantly, cooling. Everything a mint flavor should be. Alongside this no-nonsense tasting experience is a nicotine sensation supplied by 6mg of nicotine, so intermediate users can enjoy a potent sensation.

ALP Chilled Mint 9mg is a potent mint pouch designed to provide the most experienced users with an intense sensation. It does just that and is accompanied by an equally robust frost herbal-tasting experience, leaving the palate cool and refreshed.

ALP Mountain Wintergreen 3mg is a pouch for those with a low nicotine tolerance, as each contains 3mg of nicotine. Unlike its low strength, the flavor profile packs a punch with a cool, crisp, and fresh wintergreen-tasting experience.

ALP Mountain Wintergreen 6mg is a nicotine pouch that channels your inner outdoorsman, even if that’s not in your nature. With fresh and cool notes that resemble the crisp mountain air, it’s a wintergreen-flavored product that will refresh the palate. Each sachet holds 6mg of nicotine, making it a great addition for advanced and intermediate users.

ALP Mountain Wintergreen 9mg is a potent nicotine pouch built for those experienced users wanting an intense sensation, as each holds 9mg of nicotine. To match is an equally robust wintergreen-tasting experience that is cool and fresh.

ALP Refreshing Chill 3mg is one of the brand's three mint-orientated flavor profiles, but this one is smooth and extra cold, just like a fresh lake on a winter's day. Those with a low nicotine tolerance can enjoy this robust-tasting experience as this product has a nicotine content of 3mg/pouch, making the sensation present but not overwhelming.

ALP Refreshing Chill 6mg tastes as it says on the tin. With its wilderness theme running throughout the brand, ALP likens this flavor to taking a dip in a fresh lake. So, expect a cool mint flavor profile and a strong nicotine sensation as each pouch is packed with 6mg of nicotine.

ALP Refreshing Chill 9mg is the same type of robust mint pouch every experienced user has in their wheelhouse. It’s a smooth, cool, fresh-tasting product with 9mg of nicotine per sachet. They tick many boxes for those who like an intense herbal experience.

Looking for something different from a mint pouch? If so, ALP Tropical Fruit 3mg may be the answer. Each is sweet and provides a tasting experience that contains notes of many exotic fruits. And best of all, due to its nicotine strength of 3mg/sachet, users with a low tolerance can enjoy this experience without it being overpowering.

ALP Tropical Fruit 6mg is a clean, crisp nicotine pouch that transports you to an exotic island. Paired with a strong strength, intermediate users can enjoy this fruity flavor alongside a robust nicotine sensation as each sachet holds 6mg of nicotine.
ALP Tropical Fruit 9mg has an exotic fruity flavor that’s clean, crisp, and slightly sweet and pairs this with an extra strong strength supplied by the 9mg of nicotine packed into each sachet.

For many users seeking a refreshing alternative to mint, Bridge Citrus 10 mg has become their go-to. It delivers a crisp, fresh, zesty punch of clean citrus flavor reminiscent of homemade lemonade. There is no shortage of sourness and just the right amount of sweetness to bring it all into balance, making these pouches ideal for all-day use. The nicotine content is strong at 10 mg/pouch and best for experienced users.

Are you craving a taste of the summer? Perhaps with an extra-strong nicotine kick? If so, Bridge Citrus 15 mg has you covered. Prepare your tastebuds for delicious waves of citrus sourness and zing, coupled with a touch of sweetness for good measure. But, it doesn't stop there! While you savor the taste, you can expect an energizing surge of 15 mg/pouch of pure, synthetic nicotine to satisfy your craving. What's not to like?

As soon as you open a can of Bridge Citrus 4 mg, you will be hit with an ultra-refreshing, zesty aroma that takes your mind to the summertime no matter what season it is! Place one under your lip, and this is where the fun begins. There are tart, sour citrus notes up front, and a satisfying sweetness in the background that balances the flavor to perfection. The nicotine content of this product is 4 mg/pouch or 8 mg/g, making it just right for a smooth, easy-going boost and ideal for newbies.

Bridge Cool Mint 10 mg offers experienced users an energizing, refreshing mint kick and a high-strength, 10 mg/pouch buzz. The flavor is natural, icy, and fresh, with just the right level of sweetness for good balance. You may notice the underside of your lip feeling numb, but do not be alarmed, as this is part of the experience and the freezing sensation enhances the overall intensity. Also, this product is all-white, so you do not need to worry about stained teeth or bad breath!

Do you think you are ready to try one of the freshest, highest nicotine content tobacco-free products available in the USA? If so, meet Bridge Cool Mint 15 mg, which offers one of the most intense experiences on the market in both minty coolness and a stimulating buzz. You can expect waves of delicious, ice-cold flavor and an unforgettably fast-acting nicotine rush. Sound good?

Nicotine and mint is an age-old combination, for good reasons, too! There is an excellent synergy between them, as the coolness of the mint intensifies the buzz. Bridge Cool Mint 4 mg offers this exact synergy with its ultra-fresh, energizing, natural mint flavor and 4 mg/pouch of pure, synthetic nicotine. The two ingredients are included in just the right amounts to complement each other perfectly, guaranteeing you a super-satisfying experience.

Are you tired of sweet, minty, or fruity tastes and need to give your palate a breather? If so, Bridge Original 10 mg lets you do so without skipping the buzz by providing a fast-acting kick from 10 mg/pouch of clean, synthetic nicotine without any flavor.

Bridge Original 15 mg is the perfect product for when you need a nicotine boost but do not fancy any flavor. It delivers one of the most intense kicks on the market with its high nicotine content that lands at a whopping 15 mg/pouch (30 mg/g)! So, as you have likely already guessed, this is a product for experienced users only.

Whether you cannot find the right flavor for you, have burnt out on your favorite ones, or simply need a palate cleanser, Bridge Original 4 mg has just what you need - nicotine without flavor. As a result, you get the same discreet, satisfying, stain and spit-free experience that you are used to, without the distraction of added flavorings, making this product handy to have in your rotation as a go-to for when you crave a buzz but nothing else. Each pouch contains 4 mg of clean, synthetic nicotine, the perfect amount for newbies and subtle but satisfying, all-day use.

Experience minty freshness and a powerful kick with Bridge Spearmint 10 mg, which offers a smooth, slightly sweet spearmint flavor and a strong nicotine content of 10 mg/pouch. It is the perfect product for the user that seeks an intense experience and a refreshing taste without the numbing effect of menthol or sharpness of peppermint.

Bridge Spearmint 15 mg delivers a refreshing, smooth, and slightly sweet flavor of spearmint and an ultra-powerful kick. Its nicotine content lands at 15 mg/pouch (30 mg/g), making it one of the strongest pouches in the USA! As a result, it is best suited to experienced users that are familiar with the intensity of extra-strong products.

If you are looking for a refreshing mint product but find many of them overpowering or too sharp, Bridge Spearmint 4 mg may be the perfect solution. It has a smooth, delicate spearmint flavor that begins with a burst of freshness and coolness and finishes with a lasting, satisfying sweetness. Like the taste, the strength is also gentle, as this product has a nicotine content of 4 mg/pouch.

If you are craving the freshness of mint but would like to expand your flavor collection, wintergreen is an excellent alternative, especially that featured in Bridge Wintergreen 10 mg. It offers a delicious fusion of fresh, smooth wintergreen and intensely refreshing, cooling menthol. But, be prepared - because when the flavor releases alongside the 10 mg/pouch of high-purity, synthetic nicotine, a mind-blowing synergy occurs. Expect icy-cool waves of freshness under your lip and a super-stimulating buzz.

Bridge Wintergreen 15 mg is one of the strongest tobacco-free pouches available in the USA. It has a delightfully smooth, fresh, and natural wintergreen taste, enhanced in intensity with a touch of ice-cool menthol. Just moments after placing a pouch under your lip, you will experience a cascade of revitalizing flavor and a stimulating rush from the 15 mg of pure, synthetic nicotine. As you may have already gathered, this product is best suited to veteran users!

The taste of wintergreen is not everyone's cup of tea. But, if you are a fan of it and are looking for one of the most natural, accurate representations without any tobacco, Bridge Wintergreen 4 mg could be your new go-to product. It offers a delicious, clean, outdoorsy wintergreen flavor, bursting with freshness. And, to top things off, there is also menthol added for an extra cooling kick. The nicotine content is 4 mg/pouch, making this product suitable for all users.

If you prefer your nicotine pouch to have a refreshing tropical flavor together with notes of fruity sweetness then the FRE Lush 15 mg might be for your tastebuds. This delicious flavor profile is accompanied by pure power in the form of 15 mg of nicotine per pouch.

FRE Lush 12 mg offers a rejuvenating tropical fruit flavor with ounces of sweetness, citrus sourness, and a cooling finish. It also delivers an intense kick due to its extra-strong nicotine content of 12 mg/pouch, making it best suited to well-versed users.

FRE Lush 9 mg will tantalize your taste buds with its delicious tropical fruit medley. It is bursting with sweetness and sourness and has a cooling finish, making this a product with a very fitting name. You can also expect a powerful kick from its strong nicotine content of 9 mg/pouch.

FRE Mint 12 mg is the ultimate product for the well-versed mint fanatic seeking a powerful kick. It offers a crisp, icy-cool, fresh hit of mint in combination with an extra-strong nicotine content of 12 mg/pouch that guarantees an intense experience.
FRE Mint 3mg is a fresh and ice-cold-tasting nicotine pouch with a low strength for those less experienced users who want a steady and not overwhelming sensation.

FRE Mint 6mg is one of the more popular pouches in this line. It has crisp, herbal, and icy notes — everything a mint pouch should be. Moreover, these nicotine pouches contain 6mg of nicotine, considered a more regular strength for everyday use, accommodating those new to this type of product.

FRE Mint 9 mg offers a bold, crisp, and cooling mint taste that provides lasting freshness and synergizes exceptionally well with the strong nicotine content of 9 mg/pouch for a powerful, uplifting experience from start to finish.

FRE Mint Mega Pack 12mg is a product for those who don’t want to have to deal with reordering FRE Mint because the twenty sachets go too quickly. That’s why this Mega Pack is here: to provide 100 pouches in a resealable bag for those who want to share and consume these potent pouches without fretting over how many they have left.

FRE Mint Mega Pack 6mg brings 100 of your favorite nicotine pouches in one bag. It can be used as a refill, and users can fill their cans up when they run out. Or, because the bag is resealable, you can just keep it with you when you want a FRE Mint 6mg. It’s convenient and ensures there is enough to share with friends.

FRE Original 12mg is an extra nicotine pouch suitable for the more experienced and veteran users out there, as the sensation provided is intense. With 12mg of nicotine per sachet, it packs a punch and is not accompanied by a tasting experience, leaving the user to revel in this pure and potent sensation.

FRE Original 15mg is one of the strongest nicotine pouches in this brand’s repertoire. Its robust strength is supplied by 15mg of nicotine per sachet, ideal for the most experienced users wanting an intense sensation. Another factor that sets this pouch apart is it's unflavored, allowing consumers to enjoy a pure, no-frills nicotine delivery.

FRE Original 3mg is a nicotine pouch built for a no-frills experience. It’s unflavored, meaning users can enjoy the steady nicotine sensation without other additives. Each sachet holds 3mg of nicotine, which is suitable for those reducing their nicotine intake or with a low tolerance.

FRE Original 6 mg has an all-day use nicotine strength suitable for intermediate and experienced users as each sachet holds 6mg of nicotine. However, what doesn’t join this sensation is a flavor profile, allowing the user to enjoy this pure experience without distraction.

FRE Original 9mg is a nicotine pouch that lets its strong nicotine strength do the talking. With no tasting experience, users can relish this potent nicotine sensation supplied by the 9mg held within each sachet. It’s a pouch for experienced users.

This minty sensation called FRE Mint 15 mg exudes power, power, power. The ice cold freshness hits you immediately after you place a pouch under your lip, and the 15 mg/pouch of nicotine along with it. 15 mg is strong, even for the well-versed user, and will guarantee an extremely strong experience.

Whether you need to give your taste buds some time off or cannot find a flavor that suits your preferences, FRE Sweet 12 mg is the perfect solution, as it is unflavored and aroma-free. It delivers an extra-strong, 12 mg/pouch nicotine kick for lasting satisfaction without anything else.

With FRE Sweet 15 mg you will enjoy a very powerful nicotine release without the interruption of overwhelming flavor or aroma, for this product is completely unflavored. One of the benefits of an unflavored pouch such as this is that you don’t get that constant powerful flavor in your mouth, staining everything you eat or drink. The 15 mg/pouch of nicotine is among the strongest available in the US - be prepared for an incredible kick!

If you need nicotine without frills, FRE Sweet 9 mg will give you exactly that. This product's sole purpose is to deliver a strong, 9mg/pouch kick without any other distractions, so it is unflavored and aroma-free.

Each pouch of FRE Wintergreen 12 mg provides an intensely refreshing experience. You can expect a bold, natural wintergreen taste with a rejuvenating, cooling finish that leaves your mouth feeling fresh and a powerful nicotine effect from its extra-strong, 12 mg/pouch content.

With FRE Wintergreen 15 mg the taste of wintergreen is full-bodied and rich making this suitable for users looking for a mint flavor that has a more soothing character to it in comparison to other mint types. It’s both refreshing and soothing at the same time paired with sweet undertones.

FRE Wintergreen 3mg incorporates one of the most popular flavors in the US with an accommodating strength for those less accustomed to nicotine or those reducing their nicotine intake. Each pouch holds 3mg of nicotine and a fresh, piney, and slightly sweet wintergreen flavor.

FRE Wintergreen 6mg provides an aromatic and creamy twist to the popular mint flavor. It’s crisp, slightly sweet, and cool. More importantly, these pouches have regular strength, translating to 6mg of nicotine per sachet. It is a suitable option for those reducing their nicotine consumption or new to the product.

FRE Wintergreen 9 mg offers a fresh, outdoorsy wintergreen flavor with a touch of sweetness and a powerful kick from its strong nicotine content of 9 mg/pouch. If you are looking for an alternative to mint, this product would be an excellent choice!

FRE Wintergreen Mega Pack 12mg may just be what you need. Many users find themselves buying multiple cans because they get through the 20 pouches in each too quickly. So why not try a Mega Pack that holds 100 FRE nicotine pouches (the same amount as five cans)?

FRE Wintergreen Mega Pack 6mg provides more than enough for you to enjoy and share with your friends at the same time. Either use it as a refill bag or carry it around with you. It’s important to note that the bag the pouches are in is resealable, so you can keep them fresh when you’re on the go.

Grizzly Mint 12mg is an intense nicotine pouch that packs 12mg of nicotine into each sachet, making them extra-strong and suitable for those who are better equipped when using this product. The flavor that accompanies this potent sensation is a balanced herbal profile that is not overly sweet.

Grizzly Original 12mg isn’t for the fainthearted. It’s a tobacco-flavored product that packs 12mg of nicotine per sachet, making it a product for the more advanced nicotine pouch users. The flavor is reminiscent of Grizzly Dip, so expect a rich and bold character to accompany the robust nicotine sensation.

Unlock a potent nicotine pouch experience with Grizzly Original 15mg. Each sachet is tobacco-leaf-free, holds 15mg of nicotine, and supplies a tobacco-like tasting experience that is almost as rich as the Grizzly dipping tobacco itself.

Grizzly Original 6mg is a nicotine pouch from the American Snuff Company. It takes the flavor of the popular Grizzly dipping tobacco and puts it into a tobacco-free format. With a rich tobacco-like flavor and 6mg of nicotine per sachet, it’s a product for those who want to cut their tobacco intake but still enjoy that rich and bright taste.

Increase the intensity with Grizzly Southern 12mg. This extra-strong pouch delivers 12mg of nicotine and features a rich, southern-inspired flavor that’s smooth, slightly sweet, and bold. It’s a top pick for users looking for something different from mint, with all the strength and character Grizzly is known for.

Grizzly Original 9mg is a strong nicotine pouch with a rich-tasting experience. Like Grizzly Dip, Grizzly Original imitates the same robust tobacco-like flavor, but without the tobacco, meaning users can enjoy this experience without stained teeth or bad breath becoming a problem. Alongside this tasting experience comes 9mg of nicotine per pouch, providing a robust sensation.

Grizzly Wintergreen 12mg turns up the intensity on America’s favorite flavor. With a bold 12mg of nicotine per pouch, this product is made for experienced users who want a stronger sensation without sacrificing taste. The signature wintergreen profile is smooth, slightly sweet, and minty fresh, delivering a balanced experience that’s both satisfying and familiar.

HIT Blackberry are high-power nicotine pouches with a refreshing, sweet, and tart blackberry taste. Fruit isn’t the easiest flavor to replicate, but GN has it spot on with HIT, thanks to them adding essential oils to give this product a natural, well-balanced profile. The nicotine content is 13 mg/pouch and is released rapidly, so these pouches are best kept for veteran users!

For the ultimate in strength, Grizzly Wintergreen 15mg leads the pack. This extra-strong pouch delivers a full 15mg of nicotine, designed specifically for seasoned users looking for maximum intensity. It’s backed by Grizzly’s iconic wintergreen flavor - sweet, minty, and creamy with a cooling finish.

HIT Blueberry deliver the delicious taste of blueberry in a delightfully fresh and balanced way, thanks to the use of natural flavor-enhancing oils. Due to their super-strong nicotine content of 13 mg/pouch, they are best for experienced users rather than newbies.

Grizzly Wintergreen 9mg pairs the most popular flavor in the US market with a strong nicotine content. The potent nicotine sensation and sweet, fresh, and creamy flavor combine perfectly, creating an experience many advanced users will relish.

HIT Cherry offer the classic, thirst-quenching taste of Dr. Pepper. They’re sharp, tangy, fizzy, and packed with delicious cherry sweetness. The nicotine content is super strong at 13 mg/pouch, so this product is best for well-versed users only.

HIT Lemongrass are high-strength nicotine pouches with a rejuvenating, fresh taste of lemongrass. They come bursting with citrussy, sharp and tart notes, hints of herbs, and a touch of sweetness. With a nicotine content is 13 mg/pouch, they are best for experienced users looking for a potent kick.

Get an intense kick of soothing nicotine with Juice Head Blueberry Lemon Mint 12mg.  Experience the sensational flavors of tart lemon and sweet blueberry with the familiar, refreshing minty breeze that you’re used to. With 12mg of nicotine delivered in a rapid-release, moisture-enhancing blend, Juice Head nicotine pouches are perfect for experienced nicotine users looking for tobacco-free nicotine alternatives.

Juice Head Blueberry Lemon Mint 6mg delivers a smooth nicotine kick with the balanced flavor of sweet blueberry, tart lemon, and refreshing mint, making it the ideal product for users who are new to non-tobacco-derived nicotine pouches.

Juice Head Blueberry Lemon Mint 6mg delivers a smooth nicotine kick with the balanced flavor of sweet blueberry, tart lemon, and refreshing mint, making it the ideal product for users who are new to non-tobacco-derived nicotine pouches.

Get a tangy kick of mango and strawberry with a refreshing mint breeze in Juice Head Mango Strawberry Mint 12mg nicotine pouches. These delicious, all-white, slim pouches deliver a satisfying burst of flavor with an intense kick of nicotine that is sure to please experienced nicotine users.

Get a tangy kick of mango and strawberry with a refreshing mint breeze in Juice Head Mango Strawberry Mint 12mg nicotine pouches. These delicious, all-white, slim pouches deliver a satisfying burst of flavor with an intense kick of nicotine that is sure to please experienced nicotine users.

Juice Head Mango Strawberry Mint 6mg delivers a soothing kick of nicotine with a burst of tropical mango, sweet strawberry, and refreshing mint that is sure to satisfy. This balanced concoction is created with non-tobacco-derived nicotine and plant-based materials of the highest quality, packaged in discreet pouches that fit comfortably under your tongue for an even better experience.

Escape to a tropical paradise with Juice Head Peach Pineapple Mint 12mg nicotine pouches. Just as the name suggests, these tobacco-free nicotine pouches deliver a high-impact burst of delicious peach, tart pineapple, and refreshing mint alongside the soothing but intense nicotine kick you know and love, making it perfect for experienced nicotine users looking for tobacco-free alternatives for nicotine.

Juice Head Peach Pineapple Mint 6mg nicotine pouches take you to a tropical paradise bursting with flavorful peach and pineapple alongside the cooling sensation of mint. Experience a soothing kick of nicotine, perfect for those looking to make the switch from tobacco-derived nicotine products that are cleaner and more discreet.

Looking for a smooth, synthetic nicotine experience bursting with flavor? Get all that and more with Juice Head Raspberry Lemonade Mint 12mg, perfect for experienced nicotine users looking to tobacco-free alternatives. These slim, all-white pouches deliver an exciting taste of fresh raspberry, sour lemon, and refreshing mint for a truly intoxicating experience.

Escape to the nostalgic feeling of summer with Juice Head Raspberry Lemonade Mint 6mg. With the satisfying burst of refreshing raspberry, tart lemon, and breezy mint, these pouches are sure to deliver a satisfying kick of tobacco-free nicotine. Designed with an all-white, slim pouch, Juice Head Nicotine Pouches create a quick and easy synthetic nicotine experience perfect for anyone who is looking for non-tobacco-derived nicotine.

Experience the refreshing blast of sweet watermelon, delicious strawberry, and cooling mint with Juice Head Watermelon Strawberry Mint 12mg. Perfect for experienced nicotine users or those looking to intensify their nicotine experience, these pouches deliver a satisfying but smooth nicotine kick that lasts. Containing 12mg of nicotine, these pouches are sure to create a soothing, smooth kick that is satisfying and tasty.

As its name suggests, Juice Head Watermelon Strawberry Mint 6mg delivers just that - a refreshing burst of watermelon and strawberry with the added bonus of cooling mint that created a well-balanced, soothing nicotine experience. Created with the highest quality products in the industry, Juice Head Nicotine Pouches are 100% tobacco-free and perfect for any nicotine users looking to make the switch from tobacco products to nicotine alternatives.

Discover the unique taste of LUCY Breakers Apple Cider 4 mg. This product offers the flavor of freshly pressed apples and a milder nicotine experience. With a content of 4 mg per pouch, you get gentler satisfaction without compromising taste.
Discover a crisp and succulent cider flavor with LUCY Breakers Apple Cider 8 mg. Doused in the essence of freshly pressed apples, these pouches offer a delightful balance of sweetness and tanginess.

Experience the delightful marriage of juicy berries and tangy citrus with LUCY Breakers Berry Citrus 4 mg. This product's lower nicotine content of 4 mg per pouch makes it perfect for those seeking a more mellow route to satisfaction.

Unleash a fresh flavor symphony with LUCY Breakers Berry Citrus 8 mg. This blend combines the sweetness of berries with the zesty tang of citrus, resulting in a delicious wave of fruity goodness on your taste buds.

Savor the rich and aromatic notes of freshly roasted coffee in LUCY Breakers Espresso 4 mg. These pods are great if you're after a more mellow experience, thanks to their low nicotine content of 4 mg per pouch.
Embrace the boldness and richness of LUCY Breakers Espresso 8 mg. Infused with the essence of freshly roasted espresso, these pouches offer a distinct and intense flavor experience.

LUCY Apple Ice 12 mg delivers an exhilarating, extra-strong nicotine hit and a unique mint and apple flavor that offers a mouthwatering mix of sweet, tart, and crisp tones.

The crisp taste of apples combined with a cool menthol finish in LUCY Apple Ice 4 mg makes it the perfect choice if you are looking for a refreshing alternative to traditional tobacco products. Each pouch delivers 4 mg of nicotine, which is a moderate amount that’s suitable for new users.

LUCY Apple Ice 8 mg offers a fantastic fusion of fresh apple and icy mint, perfectly combined to provide an optimal balance of sweetness, coolness, and acidity. They have a nicotine content of 8 mg/pouch, putting them in the strong category, which is best for experienced users.

LUCY Breakers Apple Ice 4mg contain small, gem-like capsules you can crush for more of everything on demand. So, at any point, whether before or during use, you can press the capsule between your fingers to break open a wave of moisture, flavor, and greater intensity. This product has a nicotine content of 4 mg/pouch and a mint and apple flavor, which offers a good mix of sweet, acidic, and fresh tones.

LUCY Breakers Apple Ice 8mg offers a fusion of crisp apple and fresh mint, perfectly balanced in sweetness, coolness, and acidity. These pouches have a nicotine content of 8 mg/pouch and feature unique capsules you can crush for an extra wave of flavor and moisture whenever you like.

LUCY Breakers Mango 4mg offers a delightfully sweet and tangy exotic mango flavor and a unique capsule feature, designed to be crushed to release extra flavor and moisture whenever you choose. The nicotine content of this product is 4 mg/pouch, making it well suited to newbies and users who prefer a more gentle kick.

LUCY Breakers Mango 8mg’s fresh, exotic mango flavor makes it the perfect product if you are looking for a sweet, tangy treat. It also comes with a unique capsule feature, which enables you to release more flavor and moisture during the experience by simply crushing it between your fingers. With a nicotine content of 8 mg/pouch, this is a strong product and best suited to experienced users.

LUCY Breakers Mint 4mg delivers a cool, crisp, and fresh mint flavor with a subtle but effective 4 mg/pouch nicotine kick. It also has an exciting extra feature inside - a breakable capsule. By pressing this capsule between your fingers, you can release a wave of flavor and moisture for a boost during the experience or before you start.

LUCY Breakers Mint 8mg provides an ice-cool, bold mint flavor, and a powerful buzz from its 8 mg of ultra-pure nicotine per pouch. It also comes with an industry-first breakable capsule, which you can crush between your fingers for extra flavor and moisture on-demand.

Want a taste of coffee that’s as close as it gets to the real deal? LUCY Espresso 12 mg has what you’re after. Each pouch delivers an immediate flow of delightfully rich, freshly brewed java flavor and an intense 12 mg/pouch kick.

LUCY Espresso 4 mg provides a rich, bold taste that is perfect for coffee lovers. Each pouch delivers a satisfying burst of clean nicotine, making it the perfect way to start your day or get a midday pick-me-up.

Longing for the intensity of espresso to accompany your nicotine hit? Look no further than LUCY Espresso 8 mg. There’s now no need to combine mint or fruit flavors with your cup of joe for a simultaneous kick, as each pouch delivers the bold, rich, and dark taste of coffee.

LUCY Mint 12 mg is a high-strength product with an icy-cool mint taste. Moments after placing one under your lip, you’ll notice a satisfying tingle, which intensifies the overall experience and is reminiscent of a breath of cool winter air.
LUCY Mint 4 mg delivers a fresh, invigorating taste and satisfying 4 mg kick that is perfect if you are looking for a cool, refreshing, low-intensity nicotine experience.

LUCY Mint 8 mg offers a cool, natural mint flavor and a strong nicotine content of 8 mg/pouch. The experience this product provides is revitalizing and uplifting, thanks to its solid kick and icy finish.

This is the ideal mint nicotine pouch for users who want a crisp mint experience fitted into moist, slim pouches for first-class comfort and release, paired with a low nicotine content. Spice up your life with the tangy On! Cinnamon 2 mg! This unique pouch is perfect for the bold users that wants to try something different. Citrus is often used as a side kick in regular snus but with On! Citrus 2 mg it gets the attention it deserves! Are you bored of the common minty and fruity nicotine pouches? In that case, try the sweet and spicy On! Cinnamon 8 mg! It is a lovely complement to the rest of the On! products. The scent is sweet and inviting, it is hard to resist this exquisite and tangy pouch that will spice up your day and make you feel alive!

The refreshing and clean On! Citrus 4 mg is a great option for users that crave a refreshing and medium strong pouch to enjoy at any time of the day. The natural taste is pure and flawless, forget about any artificial taste here! The citrus is fruity, not too sweet and it has a slight tart flavor to it, and the scent is fresh and inviting as well!

If you are in the mood for something fruity and refreshing, you should definitely try On! Citrus 8 mg. This strong pouch gives a nice and even kick sine the pouch is dry at first. Citrus is a naturally fresh fruit and the taste is as close to the real stuff as you can come. It is not too sweet; it is almost on the tart side and will leave you feeling rejuvenated!

The first thing you will notice when you open a can of On! Coffee 2 mg is the luscious scent of freshly roasted coffee! The taste that follows will not make you disappointed, it has an intense coffee taste that will satisfy even the pickiest barista out there. It is a perfect after dinner treat, or for any moment when you want a delicious cup of coffee - in a pouch!

Imagine sipping on a cup of creamy, fresh coffee and at the same time get a pleasant and shy kick of nicotine – that is exactly what you get from  On! Coffee 4 mg. Its scent is luxurious and gives a hint of the taste of freshly ground coffee that is coming next. This is a must try for all coffee lovers – it is a replica of genuine coffee taste.

Just like the name On! Coffee 8mg declares, this is a nicotine pouch with the taste of coffee. But not just any coffee – imagine a creamy Frappuccino made on freshly grounded coffee beans, and you will come close to the taste of this delicious pouch. The aroma is just right – genuine coffee at its best. It is perfect as a treat after dinner, or as an in-between snack for moments when you want something uplifting.

Mint is a classic taste in nicotine pouches because it delivers a refreshing feeling. On! Mint 2 mg is no exception, it gives you a fresh sensation instantly that brings your senses to cool and snowy winter days! The peppermint aroma is extremely crisp and the taste that follows will leave you with a revitalized feeling, preparing you for your next exciting adventure.

The most common taste for nicotine pouches is mint and the reason for this is the fresh taste and icy burn you get and On! Mint 4 mg is no exception! It is a part of the mint-family and it tastes like cool peppermint, perfect to use if you have a cold or just want to freshen up. The aroma is crisp and inviting, it will leave you feeling refreshed and energized!

If you are in the mood for something refreshing and energizing, you should try On! Mint 8mg. The mint in combination with the high nicotine level will give you that awesome buzz that is sometimes needed. It starts off with a pleasant and inviting peppermint aroma, perfect for when you have a cold or just want to freshen up. The taste that follows is spicy, with a slight icy but comfortable burn that will bring your mind back to a cold winter’s day!

Are you sick and tired of overly sweet, overly aromatic, and overly flavorful nicotine pouches that can often be a bit too much? With On! Original 2 mg you will experience not only a completely flavorless sensation, but also a gentle strength level – perfect for the nicotine user looking for a low-key experience with less nicotine and zero chemical flavorings.

If you are in the mood for a neutral pouch that does not have any distinct flavor, On! Original 4 mg is the pouch for you! It gives you the nicotine release without any particular taste or aroma which is perfect if you only want the kick without any unnecessary taste. Sometimes simple is perfect and that is the case here.

Simplicity at its best! That is truly the case concerning On! Original 8 mg. Get the nice strong nicotine kick without any unnecessary taste or scent, it is completely natural and ideal if you just crave nicotine and nothing else. There are not many products like this out there and sometimes plain is perfect!

On! Wintergreen 2 mg has the distinct taste of Wintergreen, which is a sweet and minty taste with a delicious sweet aroma, perfect to use at any time of the day! If you are unsure of how wintergreen tastes, it can be compared to a classic Jenka chewing gum. The unique flavor has a perfect balance and a natural feeling!

Have you ever tried the classic chewing gum Jenka? On! Wintergreen 4 mg tastes surprisingly similar and brings you back in time to those good old days! It has a distinct cooling and refreshing aroma without any artificial taste. The natural and sweet minty taste is delicious and perfect for all occasions, as a dessert or just as a yummy treat.

The cooling and refreshing On! Wintergreen 8 mg is a must try if you were a fan of the classic chewing gum Jenka, the taste is remarkably similar! The scent is sweet and minty with a natural feeling that is not in any way artificial. This pouch is perfect for any occasions when you want that special kick!

VITO Original 9mg lets users focus on a substantial nicotine burst without distractions from other flavors. And with an impressive 9mg of nicotine in each pouch, why would a distraction from anything else be needed? The nicotine in question is derived from tobacco.

Enjoy a taste of vacation with VITO Watermelon 6mg. These pouches provide a burst of fresh, fruity watermelon for a taste profile that’s bound to transport the user to sunny days by the beach. They also contain 6mg of nicotine each, which is a moderate strength.

VITO Wintergreen 6mg centers around the smooth, bold flavor of wintergreen. This minty plant has an aromatic and creamy taste, with notes of sweetness mixed in. The pouches each contain 6mg of nicotine, which is derived from tobacco (but they’re completely tobacco-free).

VITO Wintergreen 9mg shows why wintergreen is becoming an increasingly popular pouch taste profile. It’s smooth, bold, and refreshing with a subtly sweet aftertaste, so it does a great job of cleansing the palate while providing an intriguing taste. The tobacco-free pouches each contain 9mg of nicotine, making them a higher-strength option.

Are you looking for a luxurious nicotine product with a pure flavor and a powerful kick? Then White Fox Black Edition could be just what you are looking for. With its rich taste of smokey and dark tobacco this is certainly a one-of-a-kind nicotine pouch. But don’t worry, it’s 100% tobacco-free and stain-free.

White Fox Double Mint offers a very powerful mint experience - as suggested by the name. The double mint layer refers to the mint-menthol character that gives a light sting and an ultra-refreshing sensation. The mint is slightly creamy and rich, whereas the menthol is cooling, brisk and refreshing; the perfect combination!

White Fox Full Charge’s popularity primarily comes down to four major things: its unique blend of the famous White Fox mint profiles, its extra strong nicotine content of 18 mg/pouch, its perfectly slim shaped pouches and finally its high moisture content that allows for an instantaneous flavor and nicotine release.

Since mint is such a popular nicotine pouch flavor, most producers make sure to offer at least one mint variety in their series - often several. So, what makes White Fox Peppered Mint unique? For one, it’s spicy! In a delicious blend of fresh peppermint and black pepper, this is a mint experience you will not forget! Peppermint always has both an excellent touch of sweetness, but also a very cooling effect that together leave a clean feeling in your mouth.

“A delicious spearmint character that is guaranteed to give a refresh, cooling and rejuvenating sensation” - that is how to best describe the flavor profile of White Fox Mint Slim. Although the flavor is accompanied by a light sweetness, there is no sugar in its contents. White Fox was born from the same manufacturer as best seller Siberia, and certainly gives off the same high-quality nicotine experience!

XQS Blueberry Mint 4mg is a regular-strength product with a dual flavor profile. Each sachet contains 4mg of nicotine, suitable for those who are less experienced or want to reduce their nicotine intake. Along with a steady nicotine sensation comes an interesting flavor profile that uses sweet and fresh notes of blueberry and pairs them with a crisp mint flavor.

Dual flavor profiles are a great option for those who want an experience that incorporates contrasting flavors so they can enjoy both and not have to choose between them. XQS Blueberry Mint 6mg combines sweet and tart blueberries with a fresh and cooling mint character. With 6mg of nicotine per pouch, these pouches are considered to be normal strength.

Can’t decide whether the next pouch should be fruity or minty? XQS Blueberry Mint 8mg combines the tasting notes of both, meaning the question doesn’t even need to be asked. Alongside this refreshing herbal and blueberry profile is a potent strength of 8mg of nicotine per pouch. It’s a dual flavor that packs a punch and is suitable for users who prefer strengths in the "higher medium" strength range.

XQS Fizzy Cola 4mg is a suitable option for users who want to experiment. Each pouch contains a syrupy flavor profile based on the popular fizzy drink Coca-Cola. In addition to entertaining your sweet tooth, these sachets pack 4mg of nicotine each, providing a present nicotine sensation for those with a low nicotine tolerance.

XQS Fizzy Cola 6mg is a nicotine pouch that provides a refreshing Coca-Cola in pouch form. It's a product for those who enjoy pouches with a sweeter undertone, offering a sweet and syrupy taste accompanied by subtle vanilla notes. With 6mg of nicotine in each pouch, the strength is potent but not too overpowering for regular users.

XQS Fizzy Cola 8mg may not be as good as the real thing, but it sure is good. It’s a sweet and syrupy flavor with notes of vanilla, adding a botanical twist. A robust strength accompanies this beverage-inspired tasting experience, providing 8mg of nicotine per pouch. Even though the flavor seems light, the strength brings the energy.

XQS Green Mint 4mg is the brand's obligatory mint pouch. It blends fresh, natural mint with spearmint's smooth, slightly sweet notes. This refreshing tasting experience is paired with 4mg of nicotine, which provides a present but not overwhelming strength for those new to using this product. With its flavor and strength, XQS Green Mint 4mg is a great candidate for an all-day pouch.

XQS Green Mint 6mg has 6mg of nicotine per pouch providing a significant sensation that will not be overpowering for regular users. There’s no better than a well-balanced mint flavor to accompany a nicotine sensation with its cooling tones, leaving the palate refreshed.

XQS has released a natural, fresh, and cooling mint pouch that delivers a potent sensation. XQS Green Mint 8mg has a bold, refreshing, well-rounded herbal flavor. The 8mg of nicotine within each pouch is synthetic, meaning the sensation will be 100% tobacco-free, perfect for those who want to cut their tobacco intake without losing a robust nicotine effect.

XQS Tropical 4mg is an exotically flavored nicotine pouch. Its sweet mango, tart pineapple, and sour passionfruit notes combine to create an entertaining tasting experience. Joining this profile is a regular strength suiting those with a lower nicotine tolerance as the 4mg of nicotine in each sachet delivers a present but not overwhelming sensation.

Sometimes, fruit pouches can be very one-dimensional, focusing on a specific tasting note, but XQS Tropical 6mg blends several characters together, creating an exciting tasting experience. Mango, passion fruit, and pineapple combine to create this sweet, tart, and juicy fruity flavor. Accompanying it is 6mg of nicotine per pouch, ideal for regular users wanting a potent sensation.

XQS Tropical 8mg is an exotic-tasting nicotine pouch with notes of mango, passion fruit, and pineapple combined to create this sweet and tart flavor profile. Each packs 8mg of nicotine, meaning this fruity flavor is joined by a strong-medium strength that works for most users.

ZEO Flavor Free 6mg is a nicotine pouch that simplifies the experience by eliminating unnecessary elements. Its natural flavor, which is smooth and slightly sweet, allows the user to enjoy the nicotine sensation without distraction. Each sachet holds 6mg of nicotine, enough for intermediate users to enjoy a robust sensation.

ZEO Flavor Free 9mg is a potent pouch for those who like to keep things simple. With 9mg of nicotine within each sachet, experienced users can relish this product’s intense sensation without an exuberant flavor profile complicating the experience. Instead, a neutral and smooth profile is used with a subtle sweetness.

ZEO Menthol Evergreen 12mg offers a harmonious fusion of icy menthol and the natural essence of evergreen, creating a revitalizing and brisk flavor profile. Moreover, each pouch contains a robust 12 mg of nicotine, making it an ideal choice for those seeking a strong and satisfying effect.

ZEO Menthol Evergreen 9mg is a cool, icy, and fresh nicotine pouch centered around menthol, which transports users to lush forests. This invigorating flavor is paired with an extra-strong strength, supplying 9mg of nicotine per pouch, and it lends itself to the most experienced users as it ensures a potent sensation is delivered.

ZEO Mint Breeze 12mg is a nicotine pouch that offers a balanced mint profile that is herbal, sweet, and fresh, with a subtle cooling tone running throughout. Pairing with this minty goodness is a potent nicotine content of 12 mg per portion, the perfect addition for those with a high tolerance.

ZEO Pineapple Tropic 6mg is another of the brand's fruity nicotine pouches. It has distinct pineapple notes that are sweet, tart, and slightly sour. The regular strength contains 6mg of nicotine per pouch, making it suitable for intermediate users who want an all-day-use strength.

ZEO Pineapple Tropic 9mg is a robust nicotine pouch built for experienced users who prefer a sweet, fruity flavor to a cool mint flavor. This one, in particular, utilizes tart and refreshing notes of pineapple and pairs them with 9mg of nicotine in each sachet, making this tropical experience one with a potent nicotine sensation.

ZEO Watermelon Wave 6mg is a tropical fruit pouch that provides a sweet and refreshing watermelon-tasting experience for those looking for something more adventurous. Joining this summer-inspired flavor is 6mg of nicotine per pouch, providing those new to this product and intermediate users with a bold sensation.

ZEO Watermelon Wave 9mg is a robust nicotine pouch for more advanced users who want an intense nicotine sensation. With 9mg of nicotine, these potent pouches will be too intense for those with a low tolerance. Paired with this is a flavor profile inspired by the tropics. Each pouch has a sweet, fresh, and juicy flavor that imitates the taste of watermelon.

ZEO Wintergreen Ice 12mg is a nicotine pouch offering a unique blend of bold and invigorating notes of wintergreen with a refreshingly icy twist, creating a frosty sensation that will awaken your senses. Each portion delivers a powerful punch with 12 mg of nicotine, making it the perfect choice for the more experienced user.

ZEO Wintergreen Ice 6mg takes the smooth, fresh, and popular wintergreen flavor and invigorates it by adding menthol to provide an icy coolness to the tasting experience. Joining this revitalizing flavor profile is a significant strength, providing intermediate users with a present nicotine sensation as each sachet packs 6mg of nicotine.

ZEO Wintergreen Ice 9mg is a potent pouch that packs a robust nicotine sensation, perfect for experienced users looking for extra strength. The 9mg of nicotine in each sachet is joined by an equally intense tasting experience, with fresh notes of wintergreen and icy tones from menthol; this flavor profile refreshes and reenergizes the palate.

ZIMO Blueberry 6mg mixes tart and sweet tastes together for an indulgent pouch experience. It’s fruity, flavorful, and full of character. Pouches each contain 6mg of nicotine, which works out as a moderate strength that’s suitable for the average user.

ZIMO Blueberry 8mg is a reminder of why blueberry is such a popular fruit, with irresistible notes of juicy sweetness and subtle bitterness. With a taste profile balanced between refreshing and vibrancy, it’s hard to go wrong. The portions contain 8mg of nicotine each, making them a higher-strength option and one of the most potent choices in the ZIMO range.

ZIMO Grape 6mg boasts the taste of juicy, rich grapes, transporting the user to Mediterranean vineyards. Each pouch delivers a delicious burst of fruitiness alongside 6mg of nicotine, making them an ideal mid-range option.

ZIMO Grape 8mg has a rich flavor profile focused on the unique juiciness of grapes. Not too sweet and not too tart, there’s nothing quite like it. This fruitiness comes with the 8mg of nicotine each pouch contains, making them a higher-strength option that’s perfect for experienced users seeking intensity.

ZIMO Lemon 6mg screams summer days in California, with the taste of zesty lemons bursting through from all angles. Citrus taste profiles are a classic for a reason, and this is certainly one that does them justice. Each pouch contains 6mg of nicotine for a mid-strength choice.

ZIMO Lemon 8mg is 50% tart, 50% sweet, and 100% refreshing. This results in a satisfying taste profile that is just as suitable for a hot summer day as a quiet evening in. The pouches each contain 8mg of nicotine, meaning they’re high-strength but not overpoweringly so.

ZIMO Mint 6mg releases a significant burst of crisp, minty freshness in each pouch. They’re designed to leave the mouth with a subtle, light iciness. The tobacco-free pouches contain 6mg of nicotine each, giving them a moderate strength level that’s ideal for an everyday pouch, or users who have a lower tolerance.

ZIMO Mint 8mg offers everything users could wish for in a mint pouch — a crisp freshness that cools the whole mouth down and cleanses the palate, ready for whatever the day has to bring. These pouches contain 8mg each, which is a step up from the lower-strength 6mg option.

ZIMO Original 3mg is one of ZIMO’s flavor-free offerings, with a formulation that allows users to focus on the nicotine and overall pouch experience. It’s ideal for those who don’t want to mess up their palate, and who prefer a neutral “taste.” Meanwhile, the 3mg of nicotine in each pouch is a low-strength option.

ZIMO Original 6mg offers an enjoyable release of nicotine without the distraction from other flavors. It achieves this while offering a medium nicotine dose of 6mg per pouch, which is ideal for anyone who doesn’t want to go too far in either direction on the strength spectrum.

ZIMO Original 8mg keeps things classic by offering the experience and sensations of nicotine pouches without the usual flavorings. This means users can enjoy the sweet release with no actual sweetness (or smokiness or saltiness or anything else, for that matter). The pouches contain 8mg of nicotine each, which is the highest-strength option in ZIMO’s range.

ZIMO Wintergreen 6mg delivers wintergreen in all its glory. It’s a flavor profile that has the cool refreshing character of mint yet has a unique, aromatic, and creamy tinge. The 6mg of nicotine in each pouch delivers a substantial punch of strength, without being excessive.

ZIMO Wintergreen 8mg offers the distinctive taste of Wintergreen, which is minty while not technically being a mint. Its flavor is creamy, refreshing, and bold — offering a (literally) refreshing departure from typical peppermint and spearmint options. The pouches contain 8mg of nicotine each, making them a higher-strength choice.
A citrusy, tangy burst with a smooth nicotine feel — zone Citrus 6mg offers a refreshing flavor while you reset.
Bold orange flavor meets 9mg of nicotine for a tasty citrus pouch experience.
Tropical, fruity, and refreshing — zone Dragonfruit 6mg is a flavorful escape packed into a smooth pouch.
Take it up a notch with zone Dragonfruit 9mg — a bold tropical taste paired with 9mg of nicotine for those dialed-in moments.
A crisp, fresh mint flavor for whatever your day brings. zone Mint 6mg delivers a consistent nicotine experience in a slim, easy-fit pouch.
zone Mint 9mg brings a strong burst of mint at a bold nicotine level. The perfect pouch to have with you all day.
Cool peppermint with a refreshing nicotine intensity — zone Peppermint 6mg adds a flavor boost to your day.
Bold peppermint flavor meets 9mg of nicotine for a powerful, smooth pouch experience.
zone Spearmint 6mg brings a subtle, minty flavor and balanced nicotine experience in every pouch.
A slightly sweet mint flavor with a bold 9mg nicotine sensation — zone Spearmint 9mg is cool, crisp, and consistent.

zone Tobacco 6mg delivers a classic tobacco taste with a smooth finish. Each can contains 20 pouches, crafted for bold flavor and a comfortable fit. Just pop one between your gum and lip and enjoy a balanced nicotine experience that keeps you going.
zone Tobacco 9mg delivers a bold tobacco flavor with rich, earthy notes and a strong nicotine experience. Each can packs 20 slim, smooth pouches designed for comfort and lasting flavor.
Fresh, minty, and just the right amount of intensity. zone Wintergreen 6mg offers a cool wintergreen flavor and balanced nicotine satisfaction.
When you need a stronger intensity, zone Wintergreen 9mg delivers a bold sensation of wintergreen flavor and extra nicotine intensity.

Flavored nicotine pouches can be too much sometimes. If you want to enjoy a pure nicotine experience of highest quality and with maximum comfort, then the ZYN Chill 3 mg might be just right for you. As cherry on top, these can be shipped to states that currently have flavor bans! These unflavored nicotine pouches can be enjoyed anywhere, and you needn’t worry about sweet or sour after-tastes.

Are you tired of mint, fruity or overly sweet flavors that take away the purity of a good-old nicotine kick? Perhaps the ZYN Chill 6mg might be just for you then! Each pouch will release a sugar-free and flavorless nicotine delivery out of the ordinary. With the 6 mg you can expect a slightly stronger kick which might be just what the well-versed nicotine user is looking for.

For a surprising, sweet and intense burst of flavor, try the ZYN Cinnamon 3 nicotine pouch. The ZYN Cinnamon 3 carries a satisfying taste that brings to mind gingerbread houses, cookies and freshly baked apple pie.

ZYN Cinnamon 6 offers a slightly different take on snus flavors. Instead of the usual cool minty freshness, this has been replaced with a burst of flavor from cinnamon. Without any tobacco, the flavor is pure and not overpowered, making this a sensationally zingy option.

Refreshing, surprising and delightfully fruity, ZYN Citrus 3 pouches have a bright, playful flavor that evokes rolling meadows, citrus groves and hot summer days. The ZYN Citrus 3 nicotine pouch has a deeply satisfying orange taste underscored with subtle undertones of sweet lemongrass.

ZYN Citrus 6 mg delivers a fresh, refreshing and stimulating flavor experience that is perfectly matched with a slightly stronger nicotine kick. Citrus is a popular pouch flavor thanks to its clean and clear taste and has become one of our top sellers with its natural profile of lemon and lime.

What could be better than starting the day with a coffee? Starting the day with ZYN Coffee 3 of course! These exciting pouches come packed with a fresh burst of richly brewed coffee - that's coupled with the fact that you get a nicotine hit.

Do you love the taste of a freshly brewed cup of joe? If so, then you can’t pass up trying the ZYN Coffee 6! This easy-to-use nicotine pouch is imbued with the deep, refreshing taste of just ground coffee, backed up with lush notes of mocha.

As soon as this is popped under the lip, ZYN Cool Mint 3 offers up a burst of refreshing mintiness to get you started. Thanks to the cool aspect of the flavor, this brings a nice icy blast to the palette that's complemented by the hit of the nicotine.

Relax, refresh and take it easy with the exhilarating taste of ZYN Cool Mint 6 nicotine pouches. If you enjoy an intense minty experience, then you’ll love the ZYN Cool Mint 6. Made from food-grade ingredients, ZYN Cool Mint 6 provides a satisfying experience and a great taste.

Have you wondered if there is a way to experience a stronger sensation without having to use a higher nicotine dosage? ZYN Menthol 3 mg is the answer! The nicotine level is medium, but the kick is powerful, and this is due to the ultra-refreshing qualities of menthol – qualities that not only give a refreshing feel but also a clean one, a rejuvenating one and an intense one. What does menthol taste like? An icy burst of cool, minty winds.

Every ZYN user knows that their nicotine pouches are rarely offered in strengths higher than 6 mg/pouch, which is fairly reasonable, but perhaps you have always longed for more! With the ZYN Menthol 6 you can experience a strength sensation that is way beyond the regular 6 mg/pouch, thanks to the use of menthol as flavoring agent – a powerful, icy, and incredibly refreshing flavor that will keep you alert all day.

ZYN Peppermint 3 offers up that more classic flavor. The crisp minty freshness is refreshing without being overly sweet or too icy - the flavor lasts too, keeping you cool for a while. This is complemented by the hit of nicotine that you receive at the same time.
Now you can enjoy the crisp, cool taste of fresh peppermint and a satisfying nicotine kick. The ZYN Peppermint 6 delivers up to an hour of nicotine combined with a rich menthol flavor.

ZYN Smooth 3mg delivers a minimalistic yet enjoyable nicotine experience. The flavor of ZYN Smooth is as neutral as can be — unlike the rest of the brand’s range, this product has an ingredient list excluding all sweeteners and flavorings. Its only taste comes from the pouch materials, which are flavorless but have a mild texture of soft, plant-based fibers. Meanwhile, the 3mg of nicotine provides a mild, low-strength delivery.

ZYN Smooth 6mg stands out from the rest of the range for being a flavor-free option. Many are curious about what ZYN smooth tastes like, but its flavor is best described as plain and neutral. Unlike other products from the brand, ZYN Smooth 6 doesn’t contain any sweeteners or flavorings, so users can simply enjoy the nicotine while feeling the silky pouches in their mouths. The 6mg of nicotine provides a medium strength while remaining tobacco-free.

Stay cool, refreshed, and minty fresh any time, any place with ZYN Spearmint 3 nicotine pouches. You can discreetly enjoy a minty hit of nicotine pleasure without nasty smoke, bad odors, or unhygienic spitting and simply relax with the spearmint flavor of ZYN Spearmint 3.

Spearmint and snus lovers rejoice! Subtle, pleasant and immensely satisfying, the ZYN Spearmint 6 delivers a refreshing burst of flavor for up to an hour. If you like the taste of menthol, but find regular peppermint or cool mint products too strong, then try the ZYN Spearmint 6.

For a taste of real freshness, try ZYN Wintergreen 3. You'll enjoy notes of sweet mint with an underlying burst of menthol. This pouch is perfect for anyone looking for cool, refreshing satisfaction. ZYN Wintergreen 3 evokes the fresh, crisp feeling of winter.

If you are looking for a crisp, intense and invigorating nicotine experience, then ZYN Wintergreen 6 will give you an authentic and satisfying burst of wintery freshness. This highly satisfying nicotine pouch is infused with notes of menthol and a subtle hint of sweetness.
